generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components // Return code: 1 | Stderr:
instance HorizontalGantryMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Brushless DC motor controlling horizontal gantry translation operates 0°–180°, max speed 60°/s."
]
instance VerticalLiftMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Brushless DC motor controlling vertical lift operates 0°–180°, max speed 30°/s."
]
instance ElectromagnetDriver : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "PWM‑controlled driver for electromagnet mounted on the end‑effector picks up/release small container pucks."
]
instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Application that continuously writes the crane state to the TimescaleDB time‑series database."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataMessage
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑resolution swing‑angle encoder 0.05° resolution at 100 Hz."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataMessage
]
instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Standard anemometer monitoring wind speed and direction at 5 Hz."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindDataMessage
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance SwingAngleDataMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindDataMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]
instance CraneStateDataMessage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LoggingApplication
]

// C10: Data
instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw swing‑angle measurement from SwingAngleEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataMessage
]
instance WindData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed and direction from AnemometerSensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindDataMessage
]
instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated crane state recorded by LoggingApplication."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataMessage
]
instance PredictedPuckCoordinateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Predicted puck coordinates from the kinematic model used for trajectory validation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDB
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataMessage
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindDataMessage
]

// C10: Models
instance KinematicPositionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical kinematic model computing puck coordinates from motor encoder readings."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnvironment
]
instance TrajectoryPlannerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Deterministic kinematic model used to compute optimal, collision‑free movement paths."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnvironment
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ActiveMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ broker receiving JSON payloads on topics 'crane/angle' and 'crane/wind'."
]
instance InfluxDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB time‑series database storing sensor data for simulation and validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB storing aggregated crane state data for historical analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]
instance SimulationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerised simulation environment running the analytic kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes optimal, collision‑free movement paths using deterministic kinematic model."
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares live encoder/IMU readings with simulated trajectories reports RMSE and flags drift."
    DTDFVocab:provides RMSEInsight, DriftFlagAction
]
instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Logs historical operational metrics into TimescaleDB for retrospective analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]
instance HumanMachineInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python‑based HMI displaying real‑time metrics, alerts, and historical trajectories allows operator to adjust tolerance and confirm or override motions."
    DTDFVocab:provides AlertInsight, ConfirmationAction, OverrideAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal, collision‑free path computed by TrajectoryGeneratorService."
]
instance RMSEInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Root‑mean‑square error between predicted and actual trajectories calculated by ContinuousValidationService."
]
instance DriftFlagAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action flagging drift when RMSE exceeds allowable threshold."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Summary of operational metrics retrieved from TimescaleDB."
]
instance AlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated by HMI for anomalies such as high RMSE or mechanical limits reached."
]
instance ConfirmationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human confirmation of planned motion before execution."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance OverrideAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Human override of planned motion to adjust parameters in real time."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C17: Environment
instance CraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HorizontalGantryMotor, VerticalLiftMotor, ElectromagnetDriver,
                   SwingAngleEncoder, AnemometerSensor, LoggingApplication,
                   SwingAngleDataMessage, WindDataMessage, CraneStateDataMessage,
                   SwingAngleData, WindData, CraneStateData, PredictedPuckCoordinateData,
                   KinematicPositionModel, TrajectoryPlannerModel,
                   InfluxDB, TimescaleDB, ActiveMQBroker, SimulationEnvironment,
                   TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService,
                   HistoricalDataLoggingService, HumanMachineInterfaceService,
                   OptimalTrajectoryInsight, RMSEInsight, DriftFlagAction,
                   HistoricalDataInsight, AlertInsight, ConfirmationAction, OverrideAction
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands flow from the digital twin to the physical crane via the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to issue commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service. The trajectory data, expressed as a sequence of position way‑points and velocity profiles, is sent from the Trajectory Generator to the Control Application, which transmits the commands to the crane controllers over the Physical Crane Interface. Validation and authentication mechanisms are not detailed; the only feedback loop present in the document is the Logging Application’s continuous state logging, which allows the Continuous Validation Service to compare executed trajectories against simulations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured through a Continuous Validation Service that compares the simulated puck positions against the encoder‑derived ground truth on a real‑time basis. Discrepancies trigger alerts that are visualised on a dashboard (Grafana) and notify operators via the broker; no automatic parameter tuning is performed. Validation and verification rely on manual comparison loops and the feedback from the operator, ensuring the twin remains an accurate representation of the physical system within the defined operational envelope."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication within the digital twin is performed through an MQTT broker; the broker is used for signaling between services such as the Trajectory Generator, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. The Logging Application writes state data to a TimescaleDB database, which is a PostgreSQL‑based time‑series database. The Physical Crane Interface connects directly to the hardware controllers of the crane, but the communication protocol and network layer are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components of the digital twin are described as Docker containers: Database (TimescaleDB), MQTT Broker, Dashboard (Grafana), Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. The Physical Crane, Physical Crane Interface, Control Application, Logging Application, and Human Machine Interface are Python programs that are bundled into a Python module and are not containerized. The system can be deployed on a single machine through a Docker Compose setup; scalability, redundancy, and detailed deployment models are not provided in the document."
]
